name: Tata Neu Infinity HDFC Bank Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Tata Neu and partner Tata brands with NeuPass

domestic: Domestic lounge access became milestone based from 10-Jun-2025: Tata Neu Infinity earns 2 lounge vouchers per calendar quarter on spends of Rs 50,000 or more.
international: For the Visa variant, Priority Pass is issued only on request from 01-Jun-2025. You and your add-on member can together avail up to 4 complimentary international lounge visits per calendar year, capped at 1 per quarter.

For the RuPay variant, international lounge access is 4 complimentary visits per calendar year outside India, capped at 1 per quarter, with a temporary transaction charge reversal flow as per HDFC terms.

exclusions: wallet loads, gift or prepaid card loads, and voucher purchases
payment of card fees and other charges
Smart EMI and Dial an EMI transactions

specialSpendRules.notes: Eligible UPI spends on the RuPay variant earn 0.5% via any UPI ID plus an additional 1% via Tata Neu UPI ID, capped at 500 NeuCoins per calendar month.
Eligible grocery spends earn 1.5% NeuCoins, capped at 2,000 NeuCoins per calendar month.
Eligible insurance spends earn 1.5% NeuCoins, capped at 2,000 NeuCoins per calendar month.
Eligible utility spends earn 1.5% NeuCoins, capped at 2,000 NeuCoins per calendar month. Telecom and cable spends are separately capped at 2,000 NeuCoins per calendar month.
Education payments made directly on school or college websites or POS machines earn NeuCoins; third-party app payments do not.

joiningBenefits: 1,499 NeuCoins on Tata Neu app as reversal of first-year membership fee after the first retail transaction within 30 days of card issuance
additionalBenefits: Accelerated Tata Neu earn applies on Tata Neu app or website and eligible partner Tata brands when NeuPass is linked
NeuCoins can be used on eligible purchases on Tata Neu brands including Air India Express, Bigbasket, Croma, Westside, Tata CLiQ, IHCL, Tata 1MG, Qmin, Titan and Tanishq
1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle

salaried: Gross monthly income greater than Rs 1 lakh
selfEmployed: Annual ITR greater than Rs 12 lakh

additionalDetails: Eligible UPI spends on the RuPay variant earn 0.5% via any UPI ID and an additional 1% via Tata Neu UPI ID, capped at 500 NeuCoins per calendar month.
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-01
Audited against official HDFC Tata Neu Infinity product page, fees page, eligibility page, T&C PDF, FAQ PDF, and domestic lounge revision PDF on 2026-05-31.
Domestic lounge access became milestone based from 10-Jun-2025: Tata Neu Infinity earns 2 lounge vouchers per calendar quarter on spends of Rs 50,000 or more.

For the Visa variant, Priority Pass is issued only on request from 01-Jun-2025. You and your add-on member can together avail up to 4 complimentary international lounge visits per calendar year, capped at 1 per quarter.

For the RuPay variant, international lounge access is 4 complimentary visits per calendar year outside India, capped at 1 per quarter, with a temporary transaction charge reversal flow as per HDFC terms.
From 01-Aug-2024, eligible UPI spends on RuPay earn 0.5% via any UPI ID and an additional 1% via Tata Neu UPI ID, capped at 500 NeuCoins per calendar month.
From 01-Sep-2024, education payments through third-party apps do not earn NeuCoins, but direct school or college website and POS transactions do earn NeuCoins.
From 01-Jul-2025, online skill-based gaming transactions do not earn NeuCoins.
Partner Tata Brand accelerated rewards are governed by HDFC's fair usage policy and MID/TID mapping controls.
Unused NeuCoins expire after 1 year as per the Tata Neu rewards programme.
